summary: Completed end-to-end testing of Admin User Impersonation feature. All backend tests passed (11/11). Frontend UI flow verified: Login as button visible for non-admin users, confirmation dialog works, orange impersonation banner appears, exit impersonation returns to admin account.

issues: After exiting impersonation, user is redirected to /dashboard instead of /admin. Minor UX issue - admin may want to continue managing users.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update ImpersonationBanner.js to navigate to /admin instead of /dashboard after exiting impersonation (line 88)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All impersonation UI flows working correctly

context_for_next_testing_agent: User impersonation feature fully tested and working. Backend endpoints: POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id}, POST /api/admin/impersonation/log-exit, GET /api/admin/impersonation/audit-log all working. Frontend: Orange Login as button visible in admin panel for non-admin users, confirmation dialog shows user details and audit warning, orange banner appears at top during impersonation with VIEWING AS text and Exit button, exit returns to admin account.

POST /api/admin/impersonate/{user_id}.details: Returns JWT token for target user, blocks impersonating admin accounts (403), requires admin auth

POST /api/admin/impersonation/log-exit.details: Logs exit action to audit log, requires admin auth

GET /api/admin/impersonation/audit-log.details: Returns paginated audit log of impersonation actions

Admin panel Login as button.details: Orange LogIn icon visible for non-admin users, not visible for admin users

Confirmation dialog.details: Shows target user details, explains what will happen, warns about audit logging

Impersonation banner.details: Orange banner at top with VIEWING AS text, user email, admin email, and Exit button

Exit impersonation.details: Restores admin token, clears impersonation data, shows success toast

Audit logging.details: Both impersonate_user and exit_impersonation actions logged with timestamps

security_verified.requires_admin_auth: 401 Unauthorized without token, 403 Forbidden for non-admin users
security_verified.audit_trail: All impersonation actions logged with admin_user_id, target_user_id, and timestamp
